task.summary: Evaluate the GPT supervisor and subagent loop that implemented the Radeq public homepage repositioning.

model_or_worker.name: Codex GPT supervisor with GPT subagents
model_or_worker.role: implementation supervisor, scoped explorers, QA planner, and code reviewers

reasoning_profile.change_policy: Use Decision Mesh scope packets, keep product edits inside the Radeq repo, and require local verification plus reviewer closure before acceptance.

token_efficiency_profile.context_scope: Compact Radeq mesh packets, selected Superpowers skill instructions, targeted file reads, and bounded reviewer summaries.

input_packet_summary.summary: The supervisor used the owner's Radeq repositioning request, local product repository state, project mesh constraints, Superpowers agent workflow guidance, and scoped reviewer prompts.
allowed_context: Radeq product repository status and changed files
Decision Mesh task packets and scope constraints
forbidden_context: raw command logs beyond summarized evidence

output_pointer.summary: Accepted supervisor run: public homepage now leads with complete websites/redesigns, audit pricing, fixed public style state, no homepage demo-link decision path, and green local verification.

prompt_or_input_delta.summary: The owner approved replacing an unavailable DeepSeek role with GPT. Later reviewer findings narrowed follow-up prompts to secondary-service separation, homepage demo-link removal, theme hydration timing, and route-level demo-style isolation.
prompt_or_input_delta.rollback_path: Remove this eval record and revert the related work-log and architecture updates if the Radeq homepage repositioning slice is abandoned.

verification_evidence.evidence: Decision Mesh scope was queried before implementation and used to constrain repository, runtime, deployment, API, D1, and logging boundaries.

Code/spec reviewers identified incomplete component tracking, mixed secondary services, homepage demo links, theme hydration timing, and stored demo-style leakage; all accepted findings were fixed before final acceptance.
Radeq product checks passed: typecheck, Vitest 41 tests, Playwright 9 tests, static build, GitHub Pages build, npm audit high-level gate, and git diff whitespace check.
No lead API, D1 migration, deploy config, package/dependency, secret, remote push, or production deployment mutation was included in this slice.
